svg.text: MVCore AI Assistant for MultiValue Teams
Closed-environment enterprise architecture · LLM and data never exposed to internet · Subnet-isolated · Controlled web search egress
React · FastAPI · Fine-tuned LLM · Azure Private VNet · 4 Isolated Subnets · NSG Rules · Max 20 Users · ~$130–180/mo
AZURE PRIVATE VNET — LLM · DATA · EMBEDDINGS · SOURCE CODE NEVER LEAVE THIS BOUNDARY
Up to 20 Team Members · Browser · HTTPS only · Custom Domain
OAuth 2.0 · SAML 2.0 · MFA · Conditional Access · SSO
Max 20 users · IP Allowlist · Role assignments · FREE tier
🌐 Azure Front Door Standard — Single entry point into VNet
⚡ App Subnet · 10.0.1.0/24 · FastAPI Backend · Azure Container Apps · Auto-scale 0→3 · ~$10–15/mo
NSG: INBOUND FROM FRONT DOOR ONLY
NC4as T4 v3 · NVIDIA T4 · 16GB VRAM
Private endpoint · no public IP · encrypted
🚫 OUTBOUND INTERNET BLOCKED — Internal VNet traffic only
Anonymous proxy · no cookies · no tracking
Only search QUERY STRING leaves the VNet
NSG allows: outbound 443 to search engines only
Source code · data · embeddings NEVER sent to internet
↗ Outbound to DuckDuckGo / Bing only · Results flow back IN
✅ CONTROLLED EGRESS — Query-only · Anonymous · Isolated subnet
Tickets · sprints · status · read-only API token
NSG: ALLOW OUTBOUND to org-specific IPs only · DENY all others
Pull MV source on push → Azure Blob
RAG always current · no manual steps · sync runs inside VNet
☁ Azure Blob Storage · Private Endpoints Only · No Public IP · Encrypted at Rest · ~$5/mo
Front Door: ~$35 · FastAPI (Container Apps): ~$10–15 · LLM VM SPOT + idle-stop: ~$50–80 · SearXNG ACI: ~$4 · Blob + misc: ~$10 → Total ~$110–145/mo for 20 users
